title: Command Cockpit Path Depth Stack
summary: Added compact expandable-feeling path strata inside the Command Cockpit Quest level map without adding another scroll row.
changes: Derives latest event, level depth, gate pressure, and next move layers from reusable lane data.
Renders the layers inside the existing Quest field so clicked paths feel deeper without increasing page height.
Adds desktop and mobile styling so the strata stay compact, animated, and readable inside the first cockpit view.
